title: Buffer Demo
html:
Real-Time Data Bufferv0
Waiting for data...
POST /api/canvas/{{PROJECT}}/buffer/buffer-demo
css: .bd-root{font-family:'DM Sans',system-ui,sans-serif;height:100%;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0;color:#e2e8f0}.bd-header{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px 12px;border-bottom:1px solid #243352}.bd-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:#475569;transition:background .3s,box-shadow .3s}.bd-dot.live{background:#4ade80;box-shadow:0 0 12px #4ade8060}.bd-title{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:-.01em;flex:1}.bd-version{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;color:#475569}.bd-body{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:8px 12px}.bd-empty{text-align:center;padding:24px 0;font-size:11px;color:#475569;line-height:1.8}.bd-empty code{display:inline-block;margin-top:8px;font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;color:#67e8f9;background:#141d30;padding:4px 10px;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid #243352}.bd-items{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px}.bd-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:6px 8px;border-radius:6px;background:#141d30;border:1px solid #1a2640;animation:bd-slide-in .3s ease}.bd-item-dot{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0}.bd-item-label{font-size:11px;flex:1;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap}.bd-item-value{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;color:#67e8f9;font-weight:500}.bd-metric{display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:6px;padding:8px 0}.bd-metric-value{font-size:28px;font-weight:800;color:#67e8f9;letter-spacing:-.03em}.bd-metric-label{font-size:11px;color:#94a3b8}@keyframes bd-slide-in{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-6px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
